verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc Salomon ait : Dominus pollicitus est ut habitaret in caligine :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֖ז אָמַ֣ר שְׁלֹמֹ֑ה יְהֹוָ֣ה אָמַ֔ר לִשְׁכּ֖וֹן בָּעֲרָפֶֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then Solomon said: The Lord promised that he would dwell in a cloud.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin sanoi Salomo: Herra on sanonut tahtovansa asua pimeydessä.
verses.king_james: Then said Solomon, The Lord hath said that he would dwell in the thick darkness.

verses.latin_vulgate: ego autem ædificavi domum nomini ejus, ut habitaret ibi in perpetuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֛י בָּנִ֥יתִי בֵית־זְבֻ֖ל לָ֑ךְ וּמָכ֥וֹן לְשִׁבְתְּךָ֖ עוֹלָמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: But I have built a house to his name, that he might dwell there for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä tosin rakensin sinulle asuinhuoneen ja sian asuakses ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: But I have built an house of habitation for thee, and a place for thy dwelling for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et convertit rex faciem suam, et benedixit universæ multitudini Israël (nam omnis turba stabat intenta), et ait :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּסֵּ֤ב הַמֶּ֙לֶךְ֙ אֶת־פָּנָ֔יו וַיְבָ֕רֶךְ אֵ֖ת כׇּל־קְהַ֣ל יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וְכׇל־קְהַ֥ל יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל עוֹמֵֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the king turned his face, and blessed all the multitude of Israel for all the multitude stood attentive and he said:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuningas käänsi kasvonsa ja siunasi koko Israelin joukkoa; ja kaikki Israelin joukko seisoi.
verses.king_james: And the king turned his face, and blessed the whole congregation of Israel: and all the congregation of Israel stood.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedictus Dominus Deus Israël, qui quod locutus est David patri meo, opere complevit, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֗אמֶר בָּר֤וּךְ יְהֹוָה֙ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל אֲשֶׁר֙ דִּבֶּ֣ר בְּפִ֔יו אֵ֖ת דָּוִ֣יד אָבִ֑י וּבְיָדָ֥יו מִלֵּ֖א לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed be the Lord the God of Israel, who hath accomplished in deed that which he spoke to David my father, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän sanoi: kiitetty olkoon Herra Israelin Jumala, joka suullansa on puhunut isälleni Davidille, ja kädellänsä täyttänyt, sanoen:
verses.king_james: And he said, Blessed be the Lord God of Israel, who hath with his hands fulfilled that which he spake with his mouth to my father David, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: A die qua eduxi populum meum de terra Ægypti, non elegi civitatem de cunctis tribubus Israël ut ædificaretur in ea domus nomini meo, neque elegi quemquam alium virum ut esset dux in populo Israël :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִן־הַיּ֗וֹם אֲשֶׁ֨ר הוֹצֵ֣אתִי אֶת־עַמִּי֮ מֵאֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרַ֒יִם֒ לֹא־בָחַ֣רְתִּֽי בְעִ֗יר מִכֹּל֙ שִׁבְטֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל לִבְנ֣וֹת בַּ֔יִת לִהְי֥וֹת שְׁמִ֖י שָׁ֑ם וְלֹא־בָחַ֣רְתִּֽי בְאִ֔ישׁ לִהְי֥וֹת נָגִ֖יד עַל־עַמִּ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: From the day that I brought my people out of the land of Egypt, I chose no city among all the tribes of Israel, for a house to be built in it to my name: neither chose I any other man, to be the ruler of my people Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siitä päivästä, jona minä kansani Egyptin maalta johdatin, en ole minä yhtään kaupunkia valinnut kaikista Israelin sukukunnista, rakentaakseni huonetta minun nimeni asuinsiaksi, enkä ole yhtään miestä valinnut kansani Israelin hallitsiaksi;
verses.king_james: Since the day that I brought forth my people out of the land of Egypt I chose no city among all the tribes of Israel to build an house in, that my name might be there; neither chose I any man to be a ruler over my people Israel:

verses.latin_vulgate: sed elegi Jerusalem ut sit nomen meum in ea, et elegi David ut constituerem eum super populum meum Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָֽאֶבְחַר֙ בִּיר֣וּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם לִהְי֥וֹת שְׁמִ֖י שָׁ֑ם וָאֶבְחַ֣ר בְּדָוִ֔יד לִהְי֖וֹת עַל־עַמִּ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: But I chose Jerusalem, that my name might be there: and I chose David to set him over my people Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan Jerusalemin olen minä valinnut nimeni asuinsiaksi. Ja Davidin olen minä valinnut kansani Israelin päälle.
verses.king_james: But I have chosen Jerusalem, that my name might be there; and have chosen David to be over my people Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque fuisset voluntatis David patris mei ut ædificaret domum nomini Domini Dei Israël,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֕י עִם־לְבַ֖ב דָּוִ֣יד אָבִ֑י לִבְנ֣וֹת בַּ֔יִת לְשֵׁ֥ם יְהֹוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And whereas David my father had a mind to build a house to the name of the Lord the God of Israel,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin isäni David aikoi rakentaa Herran Israelin Jumalan nimelle huonetta,
verses.king_james: Now it was in the heart of David my father to build an house for the name of the Lord God of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: dixit Dominus ad eum : Quia hæc fuit voluntas tua, ut ædificares domum nomini meo, bene quidem fecisti hujuscemodi habere voluntatem :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהֹוָה֙ אֶל־דָּוִ֣יד אָבִ֔י יַ֗עַן אֲשֶׁ֤ר הָיָה֙ עִם־לְבָ֣בְךָ֔ לִבְנ֥וֹת בַּ֖יִת לִשְׁמִ֑י הֱֽטִיב֔וֹתָ כִּ֥י הָיָ֖ה עִם־לְבָבֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord said to him: Forasmuch as it was thy will to build a house to my name, thou hast done well indeed in having such a will:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sanoi Herra isälleni Davidille: sinä olet aikonut rakentaa minun nimelleni huonetta: sinä olet hyvin tehnyt, ettäs sitä olet aikonut;
verses.king_james: But the Lord said to David my father, Forasmuch as it was in thine heart to build an house for my name, thou didst well in that it was in thine heart:

verses.latin_vulgate: sed non tu ædificabis domum : verum filius tuus, qui egredietur de lumbis tuis, ipse ædificabit domum nomini meo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַ֣ק אַתָּ֔ה לֹ֥א תִבְנֶ֖ה הַבָּ֑יִת כִּ֤י בִנְךָ֙ הַיּוֹצֵ֣א מֵחֲלָצֶ֔יךָ הוּא־יִבְנֶ֥ה הַבַּ֖יִת לִשְׁמִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: But thou shalt not build the house, but thy son, who shall come out of thy loins, he shall build a house to my name.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei kuitenkaan pidä sinun rakentaman sitä huonetta, vaan poikas, joka kupeistas tuleva on, rakentaa minun nimelleni huoneen.
verses.king_james: Notwithstanding thou shalt not build the house; but thy son which shall come forth out of thy loins, he shall build the house for my name.

verses.latin_vulgate: Complevit ergo Dominus sermonem suum quem locutus fuerat : et ego surrexi pro David patre meo, et sedi super thronum Israël, sicut locutus est Dominus : et ædificavi domum nomini Domini Dei Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֣קֶם יְהֹוָ֔ה אֶת־דְּבָר֖וֹ אֲשֶׁ֣ר דִּבֵּ֑ר וָאָק֡וּם תַּ֩חַת֩ דָּוִ֨יד אָבִ֜י וָאֵשֵׁ֣ב ׀ עַל־כִּסֵּ֣א יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל כַּֽאֲשֶׁר֙ דִּבֶּ֣ר יְהֹוָ֔ה וָאֶבְנֶ֣ה הַבַּ֔יִת לְשֵׁ֥ם יְהֹוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord therefore hath accomplished his word which he spoke: and I am risen up in the place of David my father, and sit upon the throne of Israel, as the Lord promised: and have built a house to the name of the Lord God of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin on Herra vahvistanut sanansa, jonka hän puhunut on; sillä minä olen tullut isäni Davidin siaan, ja istun Israelin istuimella, niinkuin Herra sanonut on, ja olen rakentanut huoneen Herran Israelin Jumalan nimelle.
verses.king_james: The Lord therefore hath performed his word that he hath spoken: for I am risen up in the room of David my father, and am set on the throne of Israel, as the Lord promised, and have built the house for the name of the Lord God of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et posui in ea arcam in qua est pactum Domini quod pepigit cum filiis Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאָשִׂ֥ים שָׁם֙ אֶת־הָ֣אָר֔וֹן אֲשֶׁר־שָׁ֖ם בְּרִ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר כָּרַ֖ת עִם־בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I have put in it the ark, wherein is the covenant of the Lord, which he made with the children of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä olen pannut sinne arkin, jossa Herran liitto on, jonka hän Israelin lasten kanssa tehnyt oli.
verses.king_james: And in it have I put the ark, wherein is the covenant of the Lord, that he made with the children of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Stetit ergo coram altari Domini ex adverso universæ multitudinis Israël, et extendit manus suas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיַּעֲמֹ֗ד לִפְנֵי֙ מִזְבַּ֣ח יְהֹוָ֔ה נֶ֖גֶד כׇּל־קְהַ֣ל יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַיִּפְרֹ֖שׂ כַּפָּֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he stood before the altar of the Lord, in presence of all the multitude of Israel, and stretched forth his hands.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän seisoi Herran alttarin edessä, koko Israelin kokouksen läsnä ollessa, ja ojensi kätensä.
verses.king_james: And he stood before the altar of the Lord in the presence of all the congregation of Israel, and spread forth his hands:

verses.latin_vulgate: Siquidem fecerat Salomon basim æneam, et posuerat eam in medio basilicæ, habentem quinque cubitos longitudinis, et quinque cubitos latitudinis, et tres cubitos altitudinis : stetitque super eam, et deinceps flexis genibus contra universam multitudinem Israël, et palmis in cælum levatis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־עָשָׂ֨ה שְׁלֹמֹ֜ה כִּיּ֣וֹר נְחֹ֗שֶׁת וַֽיִּתְּנֵ֘הוּ֮ בְּת֣וֹךְ הָעֲזָרָה֒ חָמֵ֨שׁ אַמּ֜וֹת אׇרְכּ֗וֹ וְחָמֵ֤שׁ אַמּוֹת֙ רׇחְבּ֔וֹ וְאַמּ֥וֹת שָׁל֖וֹשׁ קוֹמָת֑וֹ וַיַּעֲמֹ֣ד עָלָ֗יו וַיִּבְרַ֤ךְ עַל־בִּרְכָּיו֙ נֶ֚גֶד כׇּל־קְהַ֣ל יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וַיִּפְרֹ֥שׂ כַּפָּ֖יו הַשָּׁמָֽיְמָה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: For Solomon had made a brazen scaffold, and had set it in the midst of the temple, which was five cubits long, and five cubits broad, and three cubits high: and he stood upon it: then kneeling down in the presence of all the multitude of Israel, and lifting up his hands towards heaven,
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Salomo oli tehnyt vaskikattilan ja pannut sen keskelle esihuonetta, viisi kyynärää pitkäksi ja viisi kyynärää leviäksi, ja kolme kyynärää korkiaksi. Sen tykönä seisoi hän ja lankesi polvillensa kaiken Israelin kokouksen edessä, ja ojensi kätensä taivaasen päin,
verses.king_james: For Solomon had made a brasen scaffold, of five cubits long, and five cubits broad, and three cubits high, and had set it in the midst of the court: and upon it he stood, and kneeled down upon his knees before all the congregation of Israel, and spread forth his hands toward heaven,

verses.latin_vulgate: ait : Domine Deus Israël, non est similis tui deus in cælo et in terra : qui custodis pactum et misericordiam cum servis tuis qui ambulant coram te in toto corde suo :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּאמַ֗ר {פ}יְהֹוָ֞ה אֱלֹהֵ֤י יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ אֵין־כָּמ֣וֹךָ אֱלֹהִ֔ים בַּשָּׁמַ֖יִם וּבָאָ֑רֶץ שֹׁמֵ֤ר הַבְּרִית֙ וְֽהַחֶ֔סֶד לַעֲבָדֶ֕יךָ הַהֹלְכִ֥ים לְפָנֶ֖יךָ בְּכׇל־לִבָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He said: O Lord God of Israel, there is no God like thee in heaven nor in earth: who keepest covenant and mercy with thy servants, that walk before thee with all their hearts:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoi: Herra Israelin Jumala! ei ole yhtään jumalaa sinun vertaistas, taivaissa eli maassa: sinä joka pidät liiton ja laupiuden palveliais kanssa, jotka sinun edessäs vaeltavat kaikesta sydämestänsä.
verses.king_james: And said, O Lord God of Israel, there is no God like thee in the heaven, nor in the earth; which keepest covenant, and shewest mercy unto thy servants, that walk before thee with all their hearts:

verses.latin_vulgate: qui præstitisti servo tuo David patri meo quæcumque locutus fueras ei : et quæ ore promiseras, opere complesti, sicut et præsens tempus probat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁ֣ר שָׁמַ֗רְתָּ לְעַבְדְּךָ֙ דָּוִ֣יד אָבִ֔י אֵ֥ת אֲשֶׁר־דִּבַּ֖רְתָּ ל֑וֹ וַתְּדַבֵּ֥ר בְּפִ֛יךָ וּבְיָדְךָ֥ מִלֵּ֖אתָ כַּיּ֥וֹם הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who hast performed to thy servant David my father all that thou hast promised him: and hast accomplished in fact, what thou hast spoken with thy mouth, as also the present time proveth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä olet pitänyt palvelialles Davidille minun isälleni, mitäs hänelle puhunut olet: suullas olet sinä sen puhunut ja kädelläs täyttänyt, niinkuin se tänäpäivänä tapahtunut on.
verses.king_james: Thou which hast kept with thy servant David my father that which thou hast promised him; and spakest with thy mouth, and hast fulfilled it with thine hand, as it is this day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nunc ergo Domine Deus Israël, imple servo tuo patri meo David quæcumque locutus es, dicens : Non deficiet ex te vir coram me, qui sedeat super thronum Israël : ita tamen si custodierint filii tui vias suas, et ambulaverint in lege mea, sicut et tu ambulasti coram me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֞ה יְהֹוָ֣ה ׀ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל שְׁ֠מֹ֠ר לְעַבְדְּךָ֨ דָוִ֤יד אָבִי֙ אֵת֩ אֲשֶׁ֨ר דִּבַּ֤רְתָּ לּוֹ֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר לֹא־יִכָּרֵ֨ת לְךָ֥ אִישׁ֙ מִלְּפָנַ֔י יוֹשֵׁ֖ב עַל־כִּסֵּ֣א יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל רַ֠ק אִם־יִשְׁמְר֨וּ בָנֶ֜יךָ אֶת־דַּרְכָּ֗ם לָלֶ֙כֶת֙ בְּת֣וֹרָתִ֔י כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר הָלַ֖כְתָּ לְפָנָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now then, O Lord God of Israel, fulfil to thy servant David my father, whatsoever thou hast promised him, saying: There shall not fail thee a man in my sight, to sit upon the throne of Israel: yet so that thy children take heed to their ways, and walk in my law, as thou hast walked before me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nyt Herra Israelin Jumala, pidä palvelialles Davidille minun isälleni, mitäs hänelle puhunut olet ja sanonut: ei sinusta pidä puuttuman mies minun edessäni, joka Israelin istuimella istuu: ainoastaan että sinun poikas kätkevät tiensä; että he vaeltavat minun laissani, niinkuin sinä minun edessäni vaeltanut olet.
verses.king_james: Now therefore, O Lord God of Israel, keep with thy servant David my father that which thou hast promised him, saying, There shall not fail thee a man in my sight to sit upon the throne of Israel; yet so that thy children take heed to their way to walk in my law, as thou hast walked before me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et nunc Domine Deus Israël, firmetur sermo tuus quem locutus es servo tuo David.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֕ה יְהֹוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל יֵֽאָמֵן֙ דְּבָ֣רְךָ֔ אֲשֶׁ֥ר דִּבַּ֖רְתָּ לְעַבְדְּךָ֥ לְדָוִֽיד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And now, Lord God of Israel, let thy word be established which thou hast spoken to thy servant David.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nyt Herra Israelin Jumala, anna sanas tosi olla, jonka sinä palvelialles Davidille puhunut olet.
verses.king_james: Now then, O Lord God of Israel, let thy word be verified, which thou hast spoken unto thy servant David.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ergone credibile est ut habitet Deus cum hominibus super terram ? si cælum et cæli cælorum non te capiunt, quanto magis domus ista quam ædificavi ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֚י הַֽאֻמְנָ֔ם יֵשֵׁ֧ב אֱלֹהִ֛ים אֶת־הָאָדָ֖ם עַל־הָאָ֑רֶץ הִ֠נֵּ֠ה שָׁמַ֜יִם וּשְׁמֵ֤י הַשָּׁמַ֙יִם֙ לֹ֣א יְכַלְכְּל֔וּךָ אַ֕ף כִּֽי־הַבַּ֥יִת הַזֶּ֖ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר בָּנִֽיתִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Is it credible then that God should dwell with men on the earth? If heaven and the heavens of heavens do not contain thee, how much less this house, which I have built?
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä luuletko Jumalan asuvan ihmisten tykönä maassa? katso, taivas ja taivasten taivaat ei käsitä sinua: kuinkasta se huone sen tekis; jonka minä rakentanut olen?
verses.king_james: But will God in very deed dwell with men on the earth? behold, heaven and the heaven of heavens cannot contain thee; how much less this house which I have built!

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed ad hoc tantum facta est, ut respicias orationem servi tui, et obsecrationem ejus, Domine Deus meus, et audias preces quas fundit famulus tuus coram te :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּפָנִ֜יתָ אֶל־תְּפִלַּ֧ת עַבְדְּךָ֛ וְאֶל־תְּחִנָּת֖וֹ יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהָ֑י לִשְׁמֹ֤עַ אֶל־הָֽרִנָּה֙ וְאֶל־הַתְּפִלָּ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר עַבְדְּךָ֖ מִתְפַּלֵּ֥ל לְפָנֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But to this end only it is made, that thou mayest regard the prayer of thy servant and his supplication, O Lord my God: and mayest hear the prayers which thy servant poureth out before thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta käännä sinuas, Herra minun Jumalani, sinun palvelias rukoukseen ja hänen anomisensa puoleen, kuulemaan sitä anomusta ja rukousta, jonka sinun palvelias rukoilee sinun edessäs!
verses.king_james: Have respect therefore to the prayer of thy servant, and to his supplication, O Lord my God, to hearken unto the cry and the prayer which thy servant prayeth before thee:

verses.latin_vulgate: ut aperias oculos tuos super domum istam diebus ac noctibus, super locum in quo pollicitus es ut invocaretur nomen tuum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִהְיוֹת֩ עֵינֶ֨יךָ פְתֻח֜וֹת אֶל־הַבַּ֤יִת הַזֶּה֙ יוֹמָ֣ם וָלַ֔יְלָה אֶ֨ל־הַמָּק֔וֹם אֲשֶׁ֣ר אָמַ֔רְתָּ לָשׂ֥וּם שִׁמְךָ֖ שָׁ֑ם לִשְׁמ֙וֹעַ֙ אֶל־הַתְּפִלָּ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֣ר יִתְפַּלֵּ֣ל עַבְדְּךָ֔ אֶל־הַמָּק֖וֹם הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: That thou mayest open thy eyes upon this house day and night, upon the place wherein thou hast promised that thy name should be called upon,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja että sinun silmäs olisivat avoinna tämän huoneen puoleen yötä ja päivää, sitä paikkaa päin, jostas sanonut olet, tahtovas asettaa sinun nimes sinne ja kuulevas sen rukouksen, jonka sinun palvelias siinä paikassa rukoileva on.
verses.king_james: That thine eyes may be open upon this house day and night, upon the place whereof thou hast said that thou wouldest put thy name there; to hearken unto the prayer which thy servant prayeth toward this place.

verses.latin_vulgate: et exaudires orationem quam servus tuus orat in eo : et exaudias preces famuli tui, et populi tui Israël. Quicumque oraverit in loco isto, exaudi de habitaculo tuo, id est, de cælis, et propitiare.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁ֨מַעְתָּ֜ אֶל־תַּחֲנוּנֵ֤י עַבְדְּךָ֙ וְעַמְּךָ֣ יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל אֲשֶׁ֥ר יִֽתְפַּלְל֖וּ אֶל־הַמָּק֣וֹם הַזֶּ֑ה וְ֠אַתָּ֠ה תִּשְׁמַ֞ע מִמְּק֤וֹם שִׁבְתְּךָ֙ מִן־הַשָּׁמַ֔יִם וְשָׁמַעְתָּ֖ וְסָלָֽחְתָּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And that thou wouldst hear the prayer which thy servant prayeth in it: hearken then to the prayers of thy servant, and of thy people Israel. Whosoever shall pray in its place, hear thou from thy dwelling place, that is, from heaven, and shew mercy.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin kuule nyt palvelias ja kansas Israelin rukous, jonka he tässä paikassa rukoilevat, ja kuule se sinun asumises paikasta taivaista, ja koska sinä sen kuulet, niin ole armollinen.
verses.king_james: Hearken therefore unto the supplications of thy servant, and of thy people Israel, which they shall make toward this place: hear thou from thy dwelling place, even from heaven; and when thou hearest, forgive.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si peccaverit quispiam in proximum suum, et jurare contra eum paratus venerit, seque maledicto constrinxerit coram altari in domo ista :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־יֶחֱטָ֥א אִישׁ֙ לְרֵעֵ֔הוּ וְנָשָׁא־ב֥וֹ אָלָ֖ה לְהַאֲלֹת֑וֹ וּבָ֗א אָלָ֛ה לִפְנֵ֥י מִֽזְבַּחֲךָ֖ בַּבַּ֥יִת הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: If any man sin against his neighbour, and come to swear against him, and bind himself with a curse before the altar in this house:
verses.finnish_biblia: Jos joku rikkoo lähimmäistänsä vastaan, ja vala pannaan hänen eteensä, jonka hänen vannoman pitää, ja se vala tulee sinun alttaris eteen tässä huoneessa;
verses.king_james: If a man sin against his neighbour, and an oath be laid upon him to make him swear, and the oath come before thine altar in this house;

verses.latin_vulgate: tu audies de cælo, et facies judicium servorum tuorum, ita ut reddas iniquo viam suam in caput proprium, et ulciscaris justum, retribuens ei secundum justitiam suam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֣ה ׀ תִּשְׁמַ֣ע מִן־הַשָּׁמַ֗יִם וְעָשִׂ֙יתָ֙ וְשָׁפַטְתָּ֣ אֶת־עֲבָדֶ֔יךָ לְהָשִׁ֣יב לְרָשָׁ֔ע לָתֵ֥ת דַּרְכּ֖וֹ בְּרֹאשׁ֑וֹ וּלְהַצְדִּ֣יק צַדִּ֔יק לָ֥תֶת ל֖וֹ כְּצִדְקָתֽוֹ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Then hear thou from heaven, and do justice to thy servants, so to requite the wicked by making his wickedness fall upon his own head, and to revenge the just, rewarding him according to his justice.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että sinä kuulisit taivaissa ja saattaisit palvelioilles oikeuden, kostaisit jumalattomalle ja antaisit hänen tiensä tulla hänen päänsä päälle, julistaen vanhurskaan vanhurskaaksi ja antaen hänelle hänen vanhurskautensa jälkeen.
verses.king_james: Then hear thou from heaven, and do, and judge thy servants, by requiting the wicked, by recompensing his way upon his own head; and by justifying the righteous, by giving him according to his righteousness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si superatus fuerit populus tuus Israël ab inimicis (peccabunt enim tibi), et conversi egerint pœnitentiam, et obsecraverint nomen tuum, et fuerint deprecati in loco isto,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽאִם־יִנָּגֵ֞ף עַמְּךָ֧ יִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל לִפְנֵ֥י אוֹיֵ֖ב כִּ֣י יֶחֶטְאוּ־לָ֑ךְ וְשָׁ֙בוּ֙ וְהוֹד֣וּ אֶת־שְׁמֶ֔ךָ וְהִתְפַּֽלְל֧וּ וְהִֽתְחַנְּנ֛וּ לְפָנֶ֖יךָ בַּבַּ֥יִת הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: If thy people Israel be overcome by their enemies, (for they will sin against thee,) and being converted shall do penance, and call upon thy name, and pray to thee in this place,
verses.finnish_biblia: Jos kansas Israel vihollisiltansa lyödään, että he sinua vastaan rikkoneet ovat, ja he kääntävät itsensä, tunnustaen sinun nimes, rukoilevat ja anteeksi anovat sinun edessäs tässä huoneessa;
verses.king_james: And if thy people Israel be put to the worse before the enemy, because they have sinned against thee; and shall return and confess thy name, and pray and make supplication before thee in this house;

verses.latin_vulgate: tu exaudies de cælo : et propitiare peccato populi tui Israël, et reduc eos in terram quam dedisti eis, et patribus eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּה֙ תִּשְׁמַ֣ע מִן־הַשָּׁמַ֔יִם וְסָ֣לַחְתָּ֔ לְחַטַּ֖את עַמְּךָ֣ יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַהֲשֵֽׁיבוֹתָם֙ אֶל־הָ֣אֲדָמָ֔ה אֲשֶׁר־נָתַ֥תָּה לָהֶ֖ם וְלַאֲבֹתֵיהֶֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Then hear thou from heaven, and forgive the sin of thy people Israel and bring them back into the land which thou gavest to them, and their fathers.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että sinä kuulisit taivaissa, ja olisit kansas Israelin synneille armollinen, ja antaisit heidän tulla jälleen siihen maahan, jonka heille ja heidän isillensä antanut olet.
verses.king_james: Then hear thou from the heavens, and forgive the sin of thy people Israel, and bring them again unto the land which thou gavest to them and to their fathers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si clauso cælo pluvia non fluxerit propter peccata populi, et deprecati te fuerint in loco isto, et confessi nomini tuo, et conversi a peccatis suis, cum eos afflixeris,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּהֵעָצֵ֧ר הַשָּׁמַ֛יִם וְלֹא־יִהְיֶ֥ה מָטָ֖ר כִּ֣י יֶחֶטְאוּ־לָ֑ךְ וְהִֽתְפַּֽלְל֞וּ אֶל־הַמָּק֤וֹם הַזֶּה֙ וְהוֹד֣וּ אֶת־שְׁמֶ֔ךָ מֵחַטָּאתָ֥ם יְשׁוּב֖וּן כִּ֥י תַעֲנֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: If the heavens be shut up, and there fall no rain by reason of the sin of the people, and they shall pray to thee in this place, and confess to thy name, and be converted from their sins, where thou dost afflict them,
verses.finnish_biblia: Jos taivas suljettu on, niin ettei sada, että he sinua vastaan rikkoneet ovat, ja he rukoilevat tässä paikassa ja tunnustavat sinun nimes, kääntyen synneistänsä, sitte kuin sinä heitä kurittanut olet;
verses.king_james: When the heaven is shut up, and there is no rain, because they have sinned against thee; yet if they pray toward this place, and confess thy name, and turn from their sin, when thou dost afflict them;

verses.latin_vulgate: exaudi de cælo, Domine, et dimitte peccata servis tuis et populi tui Israël, et doce eos viam bonam, per quam ingrediantur : et da pluviam terræ quam dedisti populo tuo ad possidendum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֣ה ׀ תִּשְׁמַ֣ע הַשָּׁמַ֗יִם וְסָ֨לַחְתָּ֜ לְחַטַּ֤את עֲבָדֶ֙יךָ֙ וְעַמְּךָ֣ יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל כִּ֥י תוֹרֵ֛ם אֶל־הַדֶּ֥רֶךְ הַטּוֹבָ֖ה אֲשֶׁ֣ר יֵֽלְכוּ־בָ֑הּ וְנָֽתַתָּ֤ה מָטָר֙ עַֽל־אַרְצְךָ֔ אֲשֶׁר־נָתַ֥תָּה לְעַמְּךָ֖ לְנַחֲלָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Then hear thou from heaven, O Lord, and forgive the sins of thy servants and of thy people Israel and teach them the good way in which they may walk: and give rain to thy land which thou hast given to thy people to possess.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että kuulisit taivaissa, ja olisit palveliais ja kansas Israelin rikokselle armollinen, koskas heille olet osoittanut hyvän tien, jota heidän vaeltaman pitää, ja antaisit sateen maalle, jonka kansalles antanut olet perinnöksi.
verses.king_james: Then hear thou from heaven, and forgive the sin of thy servants, and of thy people Israel, when thou hast taught them the good way, wherein they should walk; and send rain upon thy land, which thou hast given unto thy people for an inheritance.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fames si orta fuerit in terra, et pestilentia, ærugo, et aurugo, et locusta, et bruchus : et hostes, vastatis regionibus, portas obsederint civitatis, omnisque plaga et infirmitas presserit :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רָעָ֞ב כִּֽי־יִהְיֶ֣ה בָאָ֗רֶץ דֶּ֣בֶר כִּֽי־יִ֠הְיֶ֠ה שִׁדָּפ֨וֹן וְיֵֽרָק֜וֹן אַרְבֶּ֤ה וְחָסִיל֙ כִּ֣י יִֽהְיֶ֔ה כִּ֧י יָצַר־ל֛וֹ אֹיְבָ֖יו בְּאֶ֣רֶץ שְׁעָרָ֑יו כׇּל־נֶ֖גַע וְכׇֽל־מַחֲלָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: If a famine arise in the land, or a pestilence or blasting, or mildew, or locusts, or caterpillars: or if their enemies waste the country, and besiege the cities, whatsoever scourge or infirmity shall be upon them:
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin kallis aika tulee maalle, eli rutto tulee, eli kuivuus, ruoste, heinäsirkat eli jyvämadot tulevat; taikka jos heidän vihollisensa piirittävät maakunnassa heidän porttinsa, eli kaikkinainen vaiva taikka sairaus tulee:
verses.king_james: If there be dearth in the land, if there be pestilence, if there be blasting, or mildew, locusts, or caterpillers; if their enemies besiege them in the cities of their land; whatsoever sore or whatsoever sickness there be:

verses.latin_vulgate: si quis de populo tuo Israël fuerit deprecatus, cognoscens plagam et infirmitatem suam, et expanderit manus suas in domo hac,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־תְּפִלָּ֣ה כׇל־תְּחִנָּ֗ה אֲשֶׁ֤ר יִֽהְיֶה֙ לְכׇל־הָ֣אָדָ֔ם וּלְכֹ֖ל עַמְּךָ֣ יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל אֲשֶׁ֣ר יֵדְע֗וּ אִ֤ישׁ נִגְעוֹ֙ וּמַכְאֹב֔וֹ וּפָרַ֥שׂ כַּפָּ֖יו אֶל־הַבַּ֥יִת הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then if any of thy people Israel, knowing his own scourge and infirmity shall pray, and shall spread forth his hands in this house,
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikki rukoukset, kaikki anomiset, jotka kaikki ihmiset, kaikki sinun kansas Israel, pitävät, koska kukin rangaistuksensa ja murheensa tuntee ja ojentaa kätensä tämän huoneen puoleen;
verses.king_james: Then what prayer or what supplication soever shall be made of any man, or of all thy people Israel, when every one shall know his own sore and his own grief, and shall spread forth his hands in this house:

verses.latin_vulgate: tu exaudies de cælo, de sublimi scilicet habitaculo tuo : et propitiare, et redde unicuique secundum vias suas, quas nosti eum habere in corde suo (tu enim solus nosti corda filiorum hominum) :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְ֠אַתָּ֠ה תִּשְׁמַ֨ע מִן־הַשָּׁמַ֜יִם מְכ֤וֹן שִׁבְתֶּ֙ךָ֙ וְסָ֣לַחְתָּ֔ וְנָתַתָּ֤ה לָאִישׁ֙ כְּכׇל־דְּרָכָ֔יו אֲשֶׁ֥ר תֵּדַ֖ע אֶת־לְבָב֑וֹ כִּ֤י אַתָּה֙ לְבַדְּךָ֣ יָדַ֔עְתָּ אֶת־לְבַ֖ב בְּנֵ֥י הָאָדָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Hear thou from heaven, from thy high dwelling place, and forgive, and render to every one according to his ways, which thou knowest him to have in his heart: for thou only knowest the hearts of the children of men:
verses.finnish_biblia: Että kuulisit taivaista asumasias istuimelta, ja olisit armollinen, antaen jokaiselle kaiken hänen tiensä jälkeen, sen jälkeen kuin sinä tunnet hänen sydämensä; sillä sinä ainoastaan tunnet ihmisten lasten sydämet;
verses.king_james: Then hear thou from heaven thy dwelling place, and forgive, and render unto every man according unto all his ways, whose heart thou knowest; (for thou only knowest the hearts of the children of men:)

verses.latin_vulgate: ut timeant te, et ambulent in viis tuis cunctis diebus quibus vivunt super faciem terræ quam dedisti patribus nostris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְמַ֣עַן יִירָא֗וּךָ לָלֶ֙כֶת֙ בִּדְרָכֶ֔יךָ כׇּ֨ל־הַיָּמִ֔ים אֲשֶׁר־הֵ֥ם חַיִּ֖ים עַל־פְּנֵ֣י הָאֲדָמָ֑ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר נָתַ֖תָּה לַאֲבֹתֵֽינוּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: That they may fear thee, and walk in thy ways all the days that they live upon the face of the land, which thou hast given to our fathers.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että he pelkäisivät sinua, ja vaeltaisivat sinun teissäs joka päivä, niin kauvan kuin he elävät sillä maalla, jonka meidän isillemme antanut olet.
verses.king_james: That they may fear thee, to walk in thy ways, so long as they live in the land which thou gavest unto our fathers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Externum quoque, qui non est de populo tuo Israël, si venerit de terra longinqua propter nomen tuum magnum, et propter manum tuam robustam, et brachium tuum extentum, et adoraverit in loco isto,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַ֣ם אֶל־הַנׇּכְרִ֗י אֲ֠שֶׁ֠ר לֹ֥א מֵעַמְּךָ֣ יִשְׂרָאֵל֮ הוּא֒ וּבָ֣א ׀ מֵאֶ֣רֶץ רְחוֹקָ֗ה לְמַ֨עַן שִׁמְךָ֤ הַגָּדוֹל֙ וְיָדְךָ֣ הַחֲזָקָ֔ה וּֽזְרוֹעֲךָ֖ הַנְּטוּיָ֑ה וּבָ֥אוּ וְהִֽתְפַּֽלְל֖וּ אֶל־הַבַּ֥יִת הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: If the stranger also, who is not of thy people Israel, come from a far country, for the sake of thy great name, and thy strong hand, and thy stretched out arm, and adore in this place:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja jos myös joku muukalainen, joka ei ole sinun kansastas Israelista, tulee vieraalta maalta sinun suuren nimes ja voimallisen kätes, ja ojennetun käsivartes tähden, ja tulee ja rukoilee tässä huoneessa;
verses.king_james: Moreover concerning the stranger, which is not of thy people Israel, but is come from a far country for thy great name’s sake, and thy mighty hand, and thy stretched out arm; if they come and pray in this house;

verses.latin_vulgate: tu exaudies de cælo firmissimo habitaculo tuo, et facies cuncta pro quibus invocaverit te ille peregrinus : ut sciant omnes populi terræ nomen tuum, et timeant te sicut populus tuus Israël, et cognoscant quia nomen tuum invocatum est super domum hanc quam ædificavi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֞ה תִּשְׁמַ֤ע מִן־הַשָּׁמַ֙יִם֙ מִמְּכ֣וֹן שִׁבְתֶּ֔ךָ וְעָשִׂ֕יתָ כְּכֹ֛ל אֲשֶׁר־יִקְרָ֥א אֵלֶ֖יךָ הַנׇּכְרִ֑י לְמַ֣עַן יֵדְעוּ֩ כׇל־עַמֵּ֨י הָאָ֜רֶץ אֶת־שְׁמֶ֗ךָ וּלְיִרְאָ֤ה אֹֽתְךָ֙ כְּעַמְּךָ֣ יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וְלָדַ֕עַת כִּֽי־שִׁמְךָ֣ נִקְרָ֔א עַל־הַבַּ֥יִת הַזֶּ֖ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר בָּנִֽיתִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Hear thou from heaven thy firm dwelling place, and do all that which that stranger shall call upon thee for: that all the people of the earth may know thy name, and may fear thee, as thy people Israel, and may know, that thy name is invoked upon this house, which I have built.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ettäs kuulisit taivaista asumises istuimelta, ja tekisit kaiken sen, jota muukalainen sinulta anoo; että kaikki kansat maan päällä tuntisivat sinun nimes ja pelkäisivät sinua niinkuin kansas Israel, ja tietäisivät, että sinun nimeäs avuksihuudetaan tässä huoneessa, jonka minä rakentanut olen.
verses.king_james: Then hear thou from the heavens, even from thy dwelling place, and do according to all that the stranger calleth to thee for; that all people of the earth may know thy name, and fear thee, as doth thy people Israel, and may know that this house which I have built is called by thy name.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si egressus fuerit populus tuus ad bellum contra adversarios suos per viam in qua miseris eos, adorabunt te contra viam in qua civitas hæc est, quam elegisti, et domus quam ædificavi nomini tuo,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־יֵצֵ֨א עַמְּךָ֤ לַמִּלְחָמָה֙ עַל־אֹ֣יְבָ֔יו בַּדֶּ֖רֶךְ אֲשֶׁ֣ר תִּשְׁלָחֵ֑ם וְהִתְפַּֽלְל֣וּ אֵלֶ֗יךָ דֶּ֣רֶךְ הָעִ֤יר הַזֹּאת֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בָּחַ֣רְתָּ בָּ֔הּ וְהַבַּ֖יִת אֲשֶׁר־בָּנִ֥יתִי לִשְׁמֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: If thy people go out to war against their enemies, by the way that thou shalt send them, and adore thee towards the way of this city, which thou hast chosen, and the house which I have built to thy name:
verses.finnish_biblia: Jos sinun kansas lähtee sotaan vihollistansa vastaan sitä tietä, jotas heitä lähettävä olet, ja he rukoilevat sinua sillä tiellä, sitä kaupunkia päin, jonkas valinnut olet, ja sen huoneen puoleen, jonka minä sinun nimelles rakentanut olen;
verses.king_james: If thy people go out to war against their enemies by the way that thou shalt send them, and they pray unto thee toward this city which thou hast chosen, and the house which I have built for thy name;

verses.latin_vulgate: tu exaudies de cælo preces eorum, et obsecrationem : et ulciscaris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָֽׁמַעְתָּ֙ מִן־הַשָּׁמַ֔יִם אֶת־תְּפִלָּתָ֖ם וְאֶת־תְּחִנָּתָ֑ם וְעָשִׂ֖יתָ מִשְׁפָּטָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then hear thou from heaven their prayers, and their supplications, and revenge them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ettäs kuulisit heidän rukouksensa ja anomisensa taivaista, ja auttaisit heitä heidän oikeuteensa.
verses.king_james: Then hear thou from the heavens their prayer and their supplication, and maintain their cause.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si autem peccaverint tibi (neque enim est homo qui non peccet), et iratus fueris eis, et tradideris hostibus, et captivos duxerint eos in terram longinquam, vel certe quæ juxta est,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י יֶחֶטְאוּ־לָ֗ךְ כִּ֣י אֵ֤ין אָדָם֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר לֹא־יֶחֱטָ֔א וְאָנַפְתָּ֣ בָ֔ם וּנְתַתָּ֖ם לִפְנֵ֣י אוֹיֵ֑ב וְשָׁב֧וּם שׁוֹבֵיהֶ֛ם אֶל־אֶ֥רֶץ רְחוֹקָ֖ה א֥וֹ קְרוֹבָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And if they sin against thee (for there is no man that sinneth not) and thou be angry with them, and deliver them up to their enemies, and they lead them away captive to a land either afar off, or near at hand,
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin he rikkovat sinua vastaan (sillä ei yhtään ihmistä ole, joka ei syntiä tee), ja sinä vihastut heidän päällensä, ja annat heitä vihamiestensä alle, vietäviksi vankina johonkuhun maahan kauvas eli lähes;
verses.king_james: If they sin against thee, (for there is no man which sinneth not,) and thou be angry with them, and deliver them over before their enemies, and they carry them away captives unto a land far off or near;

verses.latin_vulgate: et conversi in corde suo in terra ad quam captivi ducti fuerant, egerint pœnitentiam, et deprecati te fuerint in terra captivitatis suæ, dicentes : Peccavimus : inique fecimus, injuste egimus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהֵשִׁ֙יבוּ֙ אֶל־לְבָבָ֔ם בָּאָ֖רֶץ אֲשֶׁ֣ר נִשְׁבּוּ־שָׁ֑ם וְשָׁ֣בוּ ׀ וְהִֽתְחַנְּנ֣וּ אֵלֶ֗יךָ בְּאֶ֤רֶץ שִׁבְיָם֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר חָטָ֥אנוּ הֶעֱוִ֖ינוּ וְרָשָֽׁעְנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And if they be converted in their heart in the land to which they were led captive, and do penance, and pray to thee in the land of their captivity saying: We have sinned, we have done wickedly, we have dealt unjustly:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he tekevät sydämestänsä parannuksen siinä maassa, jossa he vankina ovat, ja he kääntyvät, ja rukoilevat sinua vankeutensa maalla ja sanovat: me olemme rikkoneet, väärin tehneet ja olleet jumalattomat;
verses.king_james: Yet if they bethink themselves in the land whither they are carried captive, and turn and pray unto thee in the land of their captivity, saying, We have sinned, we have done amiss, and have dealt wickedly;

verses.latin_vulgate: et reversi fuerint ad te in toto corde suo, et in tota anima sua, in terra captivitatis suæ ad quam ducti sunt, adorabunt te contra viam terræ suæ, quam dedisti patribus eorum, et urbis quam elegisti, et domus quam ædificavi nomini tuo :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁ֣בוּ אֵלֶ֗יךָ בְּכׇל־לִבָּם֙ וּבְכׇל־נַפְשָׁ֔ם בְּאֶ֥רֶץ שִׁבְיָ֖ם אֲשֶׁר־שָׁב֣וּ אֹתָ֑ם וְהִֽתְפַּֽלְל֗וּ דֶּ֤רֶךְ אַרְצָם֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר נָתַ֣תָּה לַאֲבוֹתָ֔ם וְהָעִיר֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בָּחַ֔רְתָּ וְלַבַּ֖יִת אֲשֶׁר־בָּנִ֥יתִי לִשְׁמֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And return to thee with all their heart, and with all their soul, in the land of their captivity, to which they were led away, and adore thee towards the way of their own land which thou gavest their fathers, and of the city, which thou hast chosen, and the house which I have built to thy name:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kääntyvät sinun tykös kaikesta sydämestänsä, ja kaikesta sielustansa vankeutensa maalla, jossa heitä vankina pidetään, ja he rukoilevat sillä tiellä maansa puoleen, jonka heidän isillensä antanut olet, ja sitä kaupunkia päin, jonka valinnut olet, ja sen huoneen puoleen, jonka minä nimelles rakentanut olen;
verses.king_james: If they return to thee with all their heart and with all their soul in the land of their captivity, whither they have carried them captives, and pray toward their land, which thou gavest unto their fathers, and toward the city which thou hast chosen, and toward the house which I have built for thy name:

verses.latin_vulgate: tu exaudies de cælo, hoc est, de firmo habitaculo tuo, preces eorum : et facias judicium, et dimittas populo tuo, quamvis peccatori :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁמַעְתָּ֨ מִן־הַשָּׁמַ֜יִם מִמְּכ֣וֹן שִׁבְתְּךָ֗ אֶת־תְּפִלָּתָם֙ וְאֶת־תְּחִנֹּ֣תֵיהֶ֔ם וְעָשִׂ֖יתָ מִשְׁפָּטָ֑ם וְסָלַחְתָּ֥ לְעַמְּךָ֖ אֲשֶׁ֥ר חָטְאוּ־לָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then hear thou from heaven, that is, from thy firm dwelling place, their prayers, and do judgment, and forgive thy people, although they have sinned:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ettäs kuulisit heidän rukouksensa ja anteeksi anomisensa taivaista asumasias istuimelta, ja auttaisit heitä oikeuteensa, ja olisit kansalles armollinen, jotka sinua vastaan syntiä tehneet ovat.
verses.king_james: Then hear thou from the heavens, even from thy dwelling place, their prayer and their supplications, and maintain their cause, and forgive thy people which have sinned against thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: tu es enim Deus meus : aperiantur, quæso, oculi tui, et aures tuæ intentæ sint ad orationem quæ fit in loco isto.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַתָּ֣ה אֱלֹהַ֗י יִֽהְיוּ־נָ֤א עֵינֶ֙יךָ֙ פְּתֻח֔וֹת וְאׇזְנֶ֖יךָ קַשֻּׁב֑וֹת לִתְפִלַּ֖ת הַמָּק֥וֹם הַזֶּֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: For thou art my God: let thy eyes, I beseech thee, be open, and let thy ears be attentive to the prayer, that is made in this place.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin anna nyt, minun Jumalani, sinun silmäs avoinna olla, ja sinun korvas ottakoon vaarin rukouksesta tässä paikassa.
verses.king_james: Now, my God, let, I beseech thee, thine eyes be open, and let thine ears be attent unto the prayer that is made in this place.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nunc igitur consurge, Domine Deus, in requiem tuam, tu et arca fortitudinis tuæ : sacerdotes tui, Domine Deus, induantur salutem, et sancti tui lætentur in bonis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֗ה קוּמָ֞ה יְהֹוָ֤ה אֱלֹהִים֙ לְֽנוּחֶ֔ךָ אַתָּ֖ה וַאֲר֣וֹן עֻזֶּ֑ךָ כֹּהֲנֶ֜יךָ יְהֹוָ֤ה אֱלֹהִים֙ יִלְבְּשׁ֣וּ תְשׁוּעָ֔ה וַחֲסִידֶ֖יךָ יִשְׂמְח֥וּ בַטּֽוֹב׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now therefore arise, O Lord God, into thy resting place, thou and the ark of thy strength: let thy priests, O Lord God, put on salvation, and thy saints rejoice in good things.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin nouse nyt, Herra Jumala, sinun lepoos, sinä ja sinun voimas arkki: anna pappis, Herra Jumala, olla puetettuna autuudella, ja anna pyhäs iloita hyvyydessä.
verses.king_james: Now therefore arise, O Lord God, into thy resting place, thou, and the ark of thy strength: let thy priests, O Lord God, be clothed with salvation, and let thy saints rejoice in goodness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domine Deus, ne averteris faciem christi tui : memento misericordiarum David servi tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהִ֔ים אַל־תָּשֵׁ֖ב פְּנֵ֣י מְשִׁיחֶ֑ךָ זׇכְרָ֕ה לְחַֽסְדֵ֖י דָּוִ֥יד עַבְדֶּֽךָ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: O Lord God, turn not away the face of thy anointed: remember the mercies of David thy servant.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra Jumala! älä käännä pois sinun voideltus kasvoja: muista sen armon päälle, jonka sinä Davidille sinun palvelialles lupasit!
verses.king_james: O Lord God, turn not away the face of thine anointed: remember the mercies of David thy servant.
